scripts.pack:packages: ( cd packages/core && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../packed ) && ( cd packages/client && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../packed ) && ( cd packages/cli && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../packed )
scripts.ci:publish-matrix: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm ci:snapshot-pack && pnpm publish:dry-run && SKIP_PACK=1 PACKED_DIR="$PWD/packed" pnpm test:consumer && PACKED_DIR="$PWD/packed" pnpm test:consumer:client-bundlers
